svg.aria-label: Antique chart of The Realm of Dya, a continent in a temperate climate.
svg.title: The Realm of Dya
svg.desc: Antique chart of The Realm of Dya, a continent in a temperate climate.
svg.metadata: Vellum chart. Recipe: seed=63452 type=continent band=temperate land=0.46 grid=320x240 style=antique engine=0.1.0

g.text: Being a true & faithful chart of these waters, as surveyed
by Gryarg the Wayfarer in the year 682 of the Ember Age
